final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover, 9:16 vertical) announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, flat graphic design with bold typographic hierarchy, inspired by Wallpaper* and Monocle cover layouts
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and text blocks arranged along a strong diagonal axis from bottom-left to top-right, creating dynamic tension; portrait 9:16 frame
Subject: typographic-led cover featuring the product announcement, with "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as the two dominant text anchors
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal abstract background that supports the diagonal layout without competing with the text
Lighting/mood: flat graphic lighting, no shadows; mood is confident, modern, and editorial
Color palette: high-contrast accent color scheme — deep neutral base (near-black or off-white) with one bold saturated accent color (electric blue or vivid coral) used selectively to punch key words; accent and base must not be equal in weight
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" must both be legible and prominent; diagonal layout must be visually clear; overall feel must read as premium magazine, not social-media template
Avoid: generic gradient backgrounds; drop shadows on text; cluttered decorative elements; symmetrical centered layout; pastel low-contrast palette; watermark
